review_title: Great service and support from ITC
description: Awesome, we have seen our digital presence grow since switching over to ITC and they give us plenty of data to see whats going on with our page.
author: Dan D.
pros: I love [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] who is our customer success manager.. She always makes sure we are up to date with relevant information and that our posts get put out quickly when we send to her to add.
cons: More personalized suggestions on how to better our website over time

description: The benefits where the suggestions of the web designer, my site looks much better than I imaged it could for the price.
author: TAMARA E.
pros: It's turnkey, once ITC creates it. I have had to change my domain name and it was done quickly. The feature to toggle between English and Spanish is a great feature. For the price I highly recommend ITC Website builder, very easy to use and maintain and excellent customer service.
cons: I haven't encountered anything to improve on yet. (it's been over a year)

description: In the beginning it was great. Since Zywave purchased the company at the end of 2020, the support has been an absolute disaster. They also began overcharging clients. No one is held accountable for their mistakes and you can not get any type of customer support. I would never recommend ITC to anyone. You will regret doing business with them.
author: Andie S.
pros: They do a good job of getting the SEO rankings up.
cons: We have used ITC for many many years. We never had an issue with them until October 2020. This is when Zywave purchased the company. Since the buyout, I have not been able to get customer service. Our sales rep, [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN], has been horrible about accomplishing anything. I'm not sure if it's him or his support team, but it's embarrassing for the company. Many promises made to be broken. I inquired to get a new sales rep and was denied. Starting last month they began overcharging us. This company has just went so far downhill, that I am not sure how they will recover.

review_title: ITC is a plus for me
description: We have been happy with our site and webmail. We are in the process of updating our website and adding some new functions.
author: Noah W.
pros: Ease of access to the help desk. We utilize the webmail services to access emails when we can't get to our outlook.
cons: We have had issues recently with some functionality of our website. This will be resolved with a website update.

description: I like the look of the website and have had many compliments. I also like that it seems to work well across different platforms. I am fairly computer literate, but I'm not particularly happy with the difficulty in making changes. Quite honestly, it's fairly expensive and I'm considering moving to another product that does more automation of emails, etc, easier to use and for a similar monthly fee.
author: Bill W.
pros: The most positive feature of this software is the look of the webpage. It was also great to have the IT set it up for me.
cons: The biggest drawback is that it is NOT intuitive, taking a lot of time to navigate when wanting to make a change. In addition, there are several changes that I cannot do at all, requiring me to contact tech support to make the changes for me. I have had on a few different occasions that the changes I wanted would basically require a whole new change and would cost me more money to complete. I would really like to be able to add and take away without spending a lot of time researching, or calling IT to make those changes.

review_title: ITC Has a Very Good Website Builder!
description: The support team was excellent. However, I was glad to have an internal resource to rely on for the more technical portions of building the website.
author: Katie V.
pros: Website display is clear and has a great look. There is an extensive collection of photos to choose from to customize the appearance. The support staff was always positive and worked closely with us to get our website up and running. Our website can be changed at any time - without any additional charges. There are also some built-in features that are nice - like the built-in library of insurance definitions.
cons: Too pre-programmed to allow enough customization that we need. For example, we have a form that we need filled in and sent to us but the website builder does not allow this to be integrated into the system. Our focus is primarily commercial insurance and the Website Builder is tilted toward personal lines.

description: Good, I have increased my purchasing and will do more as it becomes more integrated with hawksoft or gains more carriers on the rater.
author: James B.
pros: [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN], I almost left and then [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] saved the day and made it easy for me to make changes and get things done. I now am able to send changes to the website or logo to here and things get done. For years I felt like the only time I was contacted was to purchase but could not get anyone to help when i needed it. We have been on solid footing for quite a few years now. I love your integrated email. I am grateful for the willingness to change the website to customize it.
cons: There are features that advisor evolved or some of the other websites like a communication portal for people to talk to us on our website.

author: Darci G.
pros: The number one thing that sticks out to me is support! About a year ago I went through a computer system rebuild and was having big issues with my email. On a weekend, I was not able to get my email to load, and it was determined I had used all of my allotted server space.... I sent an email, and a tweet and unbelievably an upper management person responded, on the weekend, directly to me via text and upgraded my plan behind the scenes so that I would have email access. We then settled the billing aspect later the next week. he was amazing, responsive and seriously put my mind at ease knowing I would be able to get to my email. THANK YOU ITC for over 15 years on services. LOYAL CUSTOMER here!!
cons: Absolutely nothing negative to say about them! NOTHING AT ALL.

review_title: Great Website, Great Customer Service and Technical Support
description: Helps bring us business and traffic to our webpage
author: Allison S.
pros: I Think the new page to help customers easily pay a bill or make a claim to a specific company is a great and very useful addition. ITC got it set up quickly so we could start using it as soon as possible. The website upgrade we just got that is going to revamp our site looks great and promising, and cant wait to see the end result and get it launched. I like how new and streamlined the new design looks, and our ITC team is great and always extremely quick and helpful!
cons: to date I have not found any cons yet. Everything has worked extremely well, and if it wasn't then ITC would fix it quickly.

review_title: Insurance Website Builder the only one we will use
author: Mary G.
pros: Love the ease in using this product, as well as the look of the site. The pricing is wonderful also
cons: There isn't much to say here, nothing comes to mind that we don't like.

review_title: i DO NOT GET ANY RESPONSES
description: I had thought I would get some one to call about questions I have
author: MARK B.
pros: I like the competence of ITC, You have a great product
cons: NO ONE RESPONDS TO QUESTIONS when I call or ask someone to call back

description: It's been an overall very good experience and if I ever have questions that are answered pretty promptly.
author: Antoine M.
pros: I find the ability to get quote requests emailed directly to us is very valuable and a great function.
cons: I feel like the ease of use for updating the website is a little high. Without regular training you forget what exactly you need to do just for minor updates.

author: Keith H.
pros: Clients seem to be able to find what they need with reasonable ease. Integrates with other ITC products
cons: Cost. Time needed to update content, wish it which it was automated.

author: TRACY S.
pros: I like the cosmetic choices. Enough choices to allow you to customize your website design.
cons: Difficult to adjust some of the features if you are familiar with the software and do it on a consistent basis.

description: So far, it's been bitterly disappointing.
author: Brian B.
pros: That the website builder had experience building websites for insurance agencies.
cons: Software is fine. My problem is there is no one to help teach you had to use the tools. The sales person is in one state. The tech team is in another state. The contact between person between myself and the tech team is in another state. The SEO person is in another state. The team is NOT integrated so changes to the website happen slowly, if at all. And my request for help just get emailed from one state to another.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very positive! ITC made a seamless transition from our old website company to their company. Very proactive in making sure our needs were met and that we were satisfied with the overall results of our website.
author: Susan V.
pros: ITC helped build our agency website which was such an easy process! We are very happy with the results and will continue to use ITC moving forward.
cons: Our agency was happy with the features, nothing that stands out as a problem. Support is always very responsive to our needs which we appreciate!

author: John A.
pros: I was very impressed with the results of ITC building our web site. Very professional
cons: I was impressed with everything ITC has done for us

author: Christopher P.
pros: Great content and great website design.
cons: Logging into client account. I’ll need to work on that.

review_title: Great Product but they dropped the ball during implementation.
description: Hmmm, customer service was spotty and I prepped for all the calls and submitted everything in writing to make the transition smooth but very few of the items I requested actually got done. Now I have a web site that looks ok but I am back to square one with SEO because they did not deliver what was promised.
author: Paul R.
pros: I like the ease of use and the layout choices were appealing.
cons: Difficult to find all the pages of content. Updating items is not easy or always intuitive. no preview prior to submitting.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Thomas S.
pros: It gives me an online presence. I'm not very tech savvy and I find it hard to work on.
cons: Hard for me to update and apply changes.

description: Much easier to make adjustments, try new things, and put new processes into effect!
author: Gamal L.
pros: Easy to use! Going thru set-up, they were constantly seeking our input, as we built it, and then as we used it! Very effective going forward!
cons: Integration with our Agency Pro software was workable, but not easy; still waiting to really see the actual results.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Good Product and staff was good to work with
author: Arthur J.
pros: Turn Key ready for most insurance agency uses
cons: Doesn't seem to have the tools to improve position in the internet or drive more traffic to the site.

author: Jennifer L.
pros: Easy to Use; Quick service, Representatives are friendly
cons: Some features have to be asked to be completed

description: ITC has been a very good purchase and has helped our agency get a sleek looking website for an affordable price. The reps over at ITC are responsive and very helpful.
author: Brian F.
pros: ITC makes managing a website very simple. The user center makes it easy to update items, add posts, make changes and keep our website evolving.
cons: ITC is sufficient for what we are looking for.

author: Woody S.
pros: I have only been a customer for about 30 days, but I am very happy with the communication that has been delivered be the Account Executives and Technical support so far!
cons: I have not had any negative experiences as of yet!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
